{"step_by_step_thinking": "Amphotericin B requires dose reduction in renal failure due to the risk of infusion-related or renal toxicity. Vancomycin does not require dose adjustment for renal impairment as it is not significantly excreted by the kidneys. Gentamicin also requires dose reduction in renal failure to avoid ototoxicity and nephrotoxicity. Doxycycline does not require dose reduction in renal failure as it is primarily eliminated through biliary excretion and not significantly affected by renal function.", "answer_choice": "B"}
